title: luvunga calophylla
intro: Luvunga calophylla, also known as the Borneo calophyllum, is a tropical tree species native to the rainforests of Southeast Asia, particularly in Borneo. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Luvunga calophylla include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and support cardiovascular health. Traditionally, the plant's oil is extracted through cold pressing, and it is used in herbal preparations such as creams, ointments, and capsules to harness its medicinal properties.
